headline: Senior Analyst at SumProduct
summary: I am a dedicated and results-driven finance professional with a strong foundation in financial modeling, data analysis, and strategic decision-making. With a Master of Finance from the University of Adelaide and a Bachelor's degree in International Finance, I bring a solid academic background combined with over two years of experience in financial analysis. Currently serving as a Senior Analyst at SumProduct, I specialize in developing and reviewing complex financial models, leveraging advanced mathematical techniques and Excel to facilitate critical business decisions. My expertise in data transformation and visualization allows me to extract, clean, and present intricate data sets, providing clear and actionable insights.

experience.title: Senior Analyst
highlights: Provide consulting solutions to financial and accounting challenges, including developing financial models and data analysis tools in Excel.
Create dynamic Power BI dashboards and reports.
Build automation models using Excel VBA, VB.NET, Power Query and Power BI.
Manage projects and train staff in data analysis and automation tools.
Write blogs for SumProduct on Power BI, Power Pivot, and Excel Challenge series.

experience.title: Analyst
highlights: Extensive experience in developing and reviewing complex financial models, employing advanced mathematical techniques and Excel to facilitate strategic decision-making.
Proficient in data transformation and visualization, employing diverse tools and technologies to extract, clean, and present intricate data sets for insightful analysis.
Skilled in providing support across various areas, including training materials, marketing material preparation, website content development, and office administration.

experience.title: Global Trade Accelerator Consultant
highlights: Identified and defined objectives of assigned marketing research projects, determining best methods to meet those objectives.
Conducted research and compiled data related to product market, customer demographics, and factors influencing demand.
Analysed results to identify ways of maximising sales and market penetration of current products.

experience.title: Commercial Banking Intern
highlights: Generated over 100 customer contacts (existing, potential) daily, utilising excellent communication skills.
Supported the sales team with the preparation of documents for loan applications.

experience.title: Trainee Accountant
highlights: Undertook the preparation of asset, liability, and capital account entries (compiling, analysing).
Created financial reports to support the accounting team.

honors: Dean's List Awards for Academic Excellence

certifications: UT.5.05x: Linear Algebra - Foundations to Frontiers
awards: Honorary Member of Golden Key Society
